description.value: Healing builds on itself when you guide it correctly.

prerequisites.other: any magical tradition trait, Positive Mastery 4

system.benefits: When you restore HP to a creature, add your Casting Stat score to the amount healed. This applies to weave-based healing only, not Medicine checks. When you cast a healing weave and achieve 3 or more targeting successes, the target also removes one [Hindered] condition of their choice.
